jobs.basic_qualifications:

- Experience handling multiple projects simultaneously
- Experience applying key financial performance indicators (KPIs) to analyses
- Experience building and managing financial models for business forecasting and problem solving
- 3+ years of dissecting financial data and identifying patterns that support business strategy experience

jobs.description:
Amazon Web Services (AWS) seeks a Senior Financial Analyst to be a key member in our AWS Industry Sales Finance team. AWS Industries is committed to helping industry customers enable their digital transformation journeys. Our primary goal is to meet customers where they are in their cloud journey and work backwards from their industry specific needs to transform their business and their entire industry.

As a Senior Financial Analyst, you will work closely with business leaders to develop financial models and analytical insights to assist in evaluating new business concepts, turning insights into operational measurements, and identifying paths to improve the overall planning and forecasting process. You will also provide strategy support to the business team.

The successful candidate will have shown experiences in past roles influencing business owners and supporting strategic decision-making in a rapidly evolving environments. This role requires a self-starter with strong modeling skills, attention to detail, and an ability to manage multiple projects effectively. This role has regular interaction with executives and various business units across Amazon and therefore requires strong interpersonal and communication skills. As a business-facing finance partner, this role requires strong business sense and capability to independently drive partnership at all levels of the organization.
jobs.description_short: Amazon Web Services (AWS) seeks a Senior Financial Analyst to be a key member in our AWS Industry Sales Finance team. AWS Industries is committed to helping industry customers enable their digital transformation

jobs.description:
The AWS Database Finance organization needs a finance professional to provide financial planning and analysis for Database Services.

We are seeking an experienced Sr. Financial Analyst to drive strategic financial planning and analysis. This role owns full P&L controllership with cloud infrastructure knowledge to plan revenue growth, capacity planning for internal and external customers, Pricing, and margin improvements.

Key job responsibilities
- Full P&L controllership
- Lead comprehensive revenue planning analysis including demand forecasting, resource allocation modeling, and scalability assessments to support both current operations and future growth
- Own end-to-end pricing strategy formulation including competitive analysis, margin optimization, and pricing model recommendations that balance profitability with market competitiveness
- Lead the annual financial planning cycle including revenue forecasting, expense budgeting, headcount planning, and variance analysis reporting
- Collaborate directly with business leadership to provide financial insights that drive decision-making for both internal operations and external customer-facing initiatives
- Identify, quantify, and implement cost optimization initiatives, driving operational efficiency while maintaining service quality and performance standards
- Manage capital expenditure planning processes, including ROI analysis, investment prioritization, and budget allocation recommendations
- Develop and maintain comprehensive financial dashboards, KPI tracking, and executive reporting that provides actionable insights into business performance and trends

A day in the life
- Reports and key metrics ownership such as MBR and WBRs
- Develop business insights and analyses.
- Compile and review financial results, create forecast and operational plans and communicate to finance/business leaders
- Support modeling efforts for pricing, product strategy and infrastructure investment decisions



About the team
The team is group of Finance Managers and Analysts supporting Non-Relational Database finance. We own Full P&L management for Non-relational Database finance and this team rolls under AWS Services Finance

jobs.description:
Are you looking for that next big Finance opportunity, a business partnering role with full P&L responsibility? Join AWS Applied AI Solutions Core Services Finance team to help shape the financial foundation of technologies that put AI to work and revolutionize industries—an opportunity to create history through financial leadership that transforms business!

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is a highly reliable, scalable, low-cost infrastructure platform in the cloud that powers hundreds of thousands of enterprises, governments and start-up businesses and organizations in over 190 countries around the world.

At Applied AI Solutions, we harness Amazon's operational expertise to become the trusted partner businesses count on every day, transforming how companies work through AI to elevate customer experiences, drive operational excellence, and accelerate success—creating a future where businesses thrive with technology they truly love and trust.

AWS Finance is seeking a Financial Analyst to partner with leadership in the AWS Applied AI Solutions Core Services portfolio. This role provides strategic financial leadership across established and emerging services, driving pricing strategy, revenue growth, cost optimization, and financial planning.


Key job responsibilities

Strategic Financial Leadership
- Act as Finance Business Partner (Finance BP) with business leaders to co-create business strategies, develop financial models, and derive actionable insights.
- Contribute to the development and implementation of the long-range strategic plan, annual plan, and quarterly forecasts
- Leverage data-driven insights and analytics to influence executive decision-making to drive revenue growth and promote cost discipline
- Foster a culture of thought leadership within the team to drive the business towards long-term profitability objectives
Pricing Strategy
- Design data-driven pricing strategies that optimize market competitiveness and profit margins
- Drive financials for Private Purchase Agreements, securing favorable terms and conditions
- Conduct comprehensive scenario analysis across pricing models to identify risk exposure and strategic opportunities
Financial Planning and Analysis
- Contribute to FP&A activities, building models to measure financial performance
- Develop forecasts and present insights to senior leadership
- Support revenue modeling and cost savings initiatives
- Evaluate new business opportunities with financial analysis
Controllership
- Deliver precise, insight-driven financial reports that enable informed executive decision-making
- Maintain rigorous financial controls and reporting standards to ensure data integrity and compliance
- Support process optimization to enhance analytical capabilities while preserving control frameworks
- Foster cross-functional collaboration to align diverse teams toward strategic objectives

About the team
AWS Applied AI Solutions Core Services Finance unites exceptional financial talent to drive the future of Agentic AI. As strategic partners to the Core Services organization, we enable their mission to become the trusted technology provider for Applied AI solutions.
jobs.description_short: Are you looking for that next big Finance opportunity, a business partnering role with full P&L responsibility? Join AWS Applied AI Solutions Core Services Finance team to help shape the financial foundation

jobs.description:
The Amazon Games Studios Finance team is seeking a highly effective Sr Financial Analyst to support our portfolio of game titles in development, including projects such as Courtroom Chaos with Snoop Dogg and upcoming Tomb Raider titles from Crystal Dynamics. The Studios Finance team owns title-level P&Ls end-to-end and supports our business partners in managing not only their budgets but also their longer-term visions.

This role will be part of broader Games Finance team in which you will be surrounded by people that are exceptionally talented, bright, and driven. To support this quickly growing business, you must be highly analytical and possess a strong passion for analytics and accountability, setting high standards, and razor-sharp accuracy. You must have the ability to structure problems, perform analysis, and present to senior executives. Supporting business partners at Amazon requires the ability to dissent, while building trust with your business partners.

Key job responsibilities
- Support title-level P&L management, including forecast updates, budget management, business partner meetings, and potentially deal modeling
- Support financial planning processes such as month-end close, guidance cycle updates, and variance commentary
- Interface with cross-functional teams and business partners to collect inputs to transform into finance recommendations and analysis
- Identify and develop process improvements to help the team reduce manual work and streamline reporting


About the team
Amazon Games brings together Amazon Games Studios and Amazon Luna to deliver engaging experiences to a broad audience of players. Amazon Luna is a cloud gaming service included with Prime that lets players instantly access a curated library of games across the devices they already own—no console or downloads required. Amazon Games Studios develops and publishes original titles in partnership with internal teams and external developers.

jobs.description:
Join the team that brought you the Echo Show, a touch-screen enabled Alexa device that supports video calling, music, weather, and more! Our Echo Software team works on not only the Echo Show but other high-profile consumer electronics products including Fire TV and the Echo family of devices. We’d love to have you join us to bring innovative experiences to millions of customers. As a software engineer in the Alexa Devices team, you will help drive innovation by developing features that present innovative speech-backed visuals on our Echo Show, Echo Spot, and similar screened Alexa devices.
Specifically, you will be responsible for developing and maintaining new systems, partnering with other Amazon and third-party services and device teams as required. You will ensure that Alexa almost never drops her end of the conversation, delivering services that respond with minimal latency at Amazon scale. You may work on device frameworks, web services, APIs, large scale data infrastructure, and more. If being at the forefront of new innovation for Alexa sounds exciting, we'd love to talk to you!

Key job responsibilities
Join the team that brought you the Echo Show, a touch-screen enabled Alexa device that supports video calling, music, weather, and more! Our Echo Software team works on not only the Echo Show but other high-profile consumer electronics products including Fire TV, Kindle, and the Echo family of devices. We’re just getting started, and we’d love to have you join us to bring innovative experiences to millions of customers.

You don’t need any experience in those specific technologies, just an enthusiasm to build state of the art software particularly around user interfaces, cross-device APIs, or cloud-based services. If this sounds appealing to you, please contact us and we’d love to chat!

If you join us, your opportunities will include:
• Invent a novel delightful Android-based experience for our customers.
• Collaborate with UX and Product owners to define customer experience and product direction.
• Deliver high quality software through working in a dynamic, team-focused Agile/Scrum environment.


A day in the life
A day in the life
You will be responsible for developing and maintaining new systems, partnering with other Amazon and third-party services and device teams as required. You will ensure that Alexa almost never drops her end of the conversation, delivering services that respond with minimal latency at Amazon scale. You will work on device frameworks, APIs and more.

- 1+ years of software development engineer or related occupational experience

- 1+ years of Object Oriented Design experience
- Bachelor's degree or foreign equivalent in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field

jobs.description:
Amazon's Weblab Analysis team enables experimental guidance for launching, conducting and making product decisions using Weblab to help Amazon build better products for customers. A/B testing is in Amazon's DNA and we're at the core of how Amazon innovates on behalf of customers. We help Amazonians make decisions about their experiments and reason about the business tradeoffs of their decisions. We research and develop decision quality improvements impacting billions of dollars in decision making every year. Improve analysis and understandability for our 60K internal users. We are seeking a skilled Software Engineer to help us build the future of experimentation systems at Amazon.

Key job responsibilities
You have an entrepreneurial spirit and want to make a big impact on Amazon and its customers. You are excited about combining science with the latest technology and finding the right tool for the job. You enjoy building high-performance systems but also have a bias for delivering simple solutions to complex problems. You challenge yourself and others to come up with better solutions. You develop strong working relationships and thrive in a collaborative team environment across engineering, science and product.

A day in the life
We're going to help Amazon make better decisions by empowering analyses for A/B-testing in Weblab systems to help teams make data driven decisions for their experiments. We will help Amazonians make the right decisions for our customers combining science, experimentation and data driven-decision making. Our work will inform some of the biggest decisions at Amazon.

About the team
We have decades of combined experience on the team in many areas of science and engineering so it's a great environment in which to learn and grow. A/B testing is one of the hottest areas of research and development in the world today and this is a chance to learn how it works in the company known for pioneering its use.

jobs.description:
The Alexa Endpoints Media Team delivers a multi-device media experience across all Alexa-enabled endpoints. We build the player that handles music, podcast, and audiobook playback for Alexa devices — whether it's a single device in the living room, a dozen devices spread throughout the house playing in sync, or a dynamic Home Theater of Echo Studios. Working on this team gives you the opportunity to contribute to a feature enjoyed by millions of customers and a strategic part of our expansion throughout the customer's home.

Beyond the scale of our impact, what makes this organization a great place to work is the level of invention in our product and the personal growth it provides as an engineer. Many of the problems we tackle start with "That would be awesome for the customer — but is it even possible to build?" There is tremendous opportunity for developers to learn and grow here.
We are looking for Software Development Engineers who want to join us on this journey to engage and delight customers as they enjoy their media throughout their whole home. You will have an enormous opportunity to make a large impact on the design, architecture, and development of consumer products used by people every day.


Key job responsibilities
* Drive and lead software design, development standards, team processes, and code reviews.
* Deliver high-quality software in a dynamic, team-focused Agile/Scrum environment.
* Contribute to the professional development of colleagues by improving their technical knowledge and engineering practices.

About the team
Within the Alexa Endpoints Media Team, the Device Group Management team is specifically responsible for building software that delivers low-latency, low-cost, highly reliable, and highly scalable cloud services. These services interact with our Alexa devices to power seamless multi-device experiences for customers across their homes.

jobs.title: Software Development Engineer, Alexa Endpoints Media

jobs.description:
We are the Last Mile Delivery Design team for Amazon Worldwide Operations. We define, build, and maintain the products that Amazon businesses use to deliver packages to customers around the world. Our team of experienced designers, researchers, and cartographers partners with product teams to understand user behaviors and needs, creating high-quality experiences that strive to not only meet those needs, but exceed them. We design experiences such as the Amazon mobile delivery platform, in-vehicle digital tools, DSP 2.0, Delivery Station tools, and other systems that support addresses, geolocation, routing, and deliveries. The experiences we create are used by multiple Amazon businesses and product lines, including Amazon Logistics, Prime Now, Amazon Fresh, Amazon Flex, Amazon Key, Lockers, I Have Space, Retail, and more.

Key job responsibilities
Our team is looking for high-performing design leaders to drive both big-picture vision and fast-paced execution, delivering near-term results while exploring future opportunities. This Senior UX Design role focuses on helping transporters safely and effectively deliver packages for our customers, providing clarity on where they they need to go, what they need to do, and the best way to get there. Success requires close collaboration with cartographers, engineers, and product managers. Many of our projects extend beyond digital interfaces, connecting with real-world physical processes. We work hands-on in our design and prototyping studio, deeply understanding customer needs and creating experiences that aim to meet them in the moments that matter most.

A day in the life
As a designer on the Last Mile Experience Design team, you will own your work end-to-end, from managing your UX backlog to developing, testing, and sharing design strategies. You’ll tackle complex design challenges with creative solutions and collaborate closely with product leaders, cartographers, and engineering teams to create robust experiences that help drivers navigate their routes safely, clearly, and efficiently. Strong collaboration and facilitation skills are essential to bring clarity and drive alignment across teams. You’ll be expected to uphold high design standards, continuously improve how we work, and advocate for quality user experiences. With customer needs at the forefront, you’ll use sound judgment, stay informed about our users, competitors, and industry trends, and contribute to delivering best-in-class navigation solutions.

About the team
We lead with vision and follow a flexible design process, adapting our approach to fit the needs of the moment. We invent through collaborative brainstorming, prototype and simulate experiences with real customers, and share our vision across teams and leadership. We scale empathy for our users to partners and leaders, ensuring our tech teams have what they need to build great products. Equally important, we prioritize a healthy work-life balance. While we are a team of high achievers, we recognize that sustainable performance requires realistic scoping and mindful workload management. We know innovation suffers when designers are stretched too thin or working unsustainable hours (many of us have families, too). Though we may put in extra effort to polish a critical project, we strive to minimize thrash, accurately scope work, and maintain a healthy, balanced work week for every person on the team.

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- 3+ years of test automation frameworks and tools building experience
- Experience programming with at least one modern language such as Java, C++, or C# including object-oriented design
- Experience in penetration testing and exploitability-focused vulnerability assessment
- Experience in platform-level security mitigations and hardening for Linux and Windows

jobs.description:
We are looking for a Software Development Engineer in Test to help automate next generation platforms. In this role you will work with system architects, software developers, program managers, QA engineers and hardware engineers to implement test automation, tool/dashboard and infrastructure development for Echo Family Devices.

Key job responsibilities As a SDET champion on the engineering team, you will own the vision for test infrastructures, build frameworks that allow developers/SQA to easily write reliable tests, and invent new mechanisms for ensuring that every change we make can be deployed safely and quickly. You will help solve our most difficult challenges, and you will coach other engineers to foster a culture of relentless high-standards. The ideal candidate for this role has a strong track record and proficiency in building efficient and innovative test tools. They are a pragmatic problem-solver with high judgment who brings an experienced perspective to balance quality and strategy trade-offs to meet the needs of Amazon Devices teams. They will bring clarity to complexity, probing assumptions, illuminating pitfalls with data, and fostering shared understanding. They have specialized knowledge analyzing test procedures, inspecting architectures and developing test infrastructure and tools that provide confidence in product quality.

Key job responsibilities
- 3+ years of test automation frameworks and tools building experience
- 2+ years of non-internship professional software development testing experience
- Experience programming with at least one modern language such as Java, C++, or C# including object-oriented design
- Experience debugging, diagnosing, and troubleshooting complex, production software issues

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- Bachelor's degree or above in computer science, computer engineering, or related field
- Knowledge of Computer Science fundamentals such as object-oriented design, algorithm design, data structures, problem solving, and complexity analysis.
- Knowledge of programming languages such as C/C++, Python, Java or Perl
jobs.description:
At Amazon, we hire the best minds in technology to innovate and build on behalf of our customers. The focus we have on our customers is why we are one of the world’s most beloved brands – customer obsession is part of our company DNA. Our Software Development Engineers (SDEs) use cutting-edge technology to solve complex problems and get to see the impact of their work first-hand. The challenges SDEs solve for at Amazon are big and influence millions of customers, sellers, and products around the world. We are looking for individuals who are passionate about creating new products, features, and services from scratch while managing ambiguity and the pace of a company where development cycles are measured in weeks, not years. If this sounds interesting to you, apply and come chart your own path at Amazon.
Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. For an update on your status, or to confirm your application was submitted successfully, please login to your candidate portal. NOTE: Amazon works with a high volume of applicants, so we appreciate your patience as we review applications

Key job responsibilities
• Collaborate with experienced cross-disciplinary Amazonians to conceive, design, and bring innovative products and services to market.
• Design and build innovative technologies in a large distributed computing environment and help lead fundamental changes in the industry.
• Create solutions to run predictions on distributed systems with exposure to innovative technologies at incredible scale and speed.
• Build distributed storage, index, and query systems that are scalable, fault-tolerant, low cost, and easy to manage/use.
• Design and code the right solutions starting with broadly defined problems.
• Work in an agile environment to deliver high-quality software.

jobs.preferred_qualifications:

- Experience with distributed, multi-tiered systems, algorithms, and relational databases.
- Experience in optimization mathematics such as linear programming and nonlinear optimization.
- Effectively articulate technical challenges and solutions.
- Adept at handling ambiguous or undefined problems as well as ability to think abstractly.
